title: ruellia prostrata var. dejecta
intro: Ruellia prostrata var. dejecta, also known as Mexican petunia or Ruellia, is a low-growing, spreading plant native to Mexico and Central America. It is used in herbal medicine to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The medicinal properties of Ruellia prostrata var. dejecta are believed to provide health benefits such as reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of Ruellia prostrata var. dejecta include infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which can be used topically or taken internally under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
